title.en: Eumelanin vs Pheomelanin — Two Pigments, One Skin

subtitle.en: eumelanin (brown-black) absorbs broadly; pheomelanin (red-yellow) absorbs only blue; their ratio sets skin and hair colour
subtitle.ko: 에우(갈-흑) 광범위 흡수, 페오(적-황) 청색만 — 비율이 피부·머리색

description.en: Eu/pheo ratio slider drives hair colour from red through blonde to black. Foundation of human pigmentation diversity.
description.ko: Eu/pheo 비율 슬라이더로 적·금·갈·흑발 색 변화. 인간 색소 다양성 기반.
